ItemTooltip.IceCube:
Sends out a tile-sliding cube of ice
Ice cubes frostburn the target briefly
ItemTooltip.IcyArrow: This enemy's movement speed is noticeably lowered
ItemTooltip.IcyAxe: Cold to the touch... it might freeze your hands
ItemTooltip.IcyPickaxe: Cold to the touch... it might freeze your hands
ItemTooltip.TheSnowball: It's either really hot or really cold. Either way it REALLY hurts
ItemTooltip.LivingWoodAcorn:
Summons a living tree sprout as your chosen familiar
You may only have one familiar summoned at a time
Right click to select various actions for your familiar
Left click to perform your selected action
ItemTooltip.LivingWoodSap: Increases minion damage and knockback by 1
ItemTooltip.DepthScales: 'Evolution has designed this for the deep...'
ItemTooltip.TheRing:
Increases all damage by 2
Increases armor penetration by 2
Increases critical strike chance by 4%
ItemTooltip.IncubatedEgg:
'A gruesome incubation has occurred'
Minion and sentry attacks have a 10% chance to generate a swarm of spiders
ItemTooltip.LeatherSheath:
Sword, axe, and pickaxe strikes deal {0}% damage and the critical strike chance is increased by {1}%
The weapon must be held and not used for {2} seconds
ItemTooltip.WebGun: Fires out a sticky globule of wet web
ItemTooltip.RainStone:
'It's said that this strange stone was torn from an entity that could control the seas...'
Activates or cancels a rainstorm
ItemTooltip.BubbleConch: Creates a barrage of enemy lifting bubbles
ItemTooltip.JellyfishResonator:
Summons The Queen Jellyfish
Only usable on the beach during the day
ItemTooltip.SeaTurtlesBulwark: Taking damage releases a touchable mote that recovers 25% of the damage you took
ItemTooltip.ArcaneArmorFabricator: A mystical device that can fabricate arcane items
ItemTooltip.MagmaLocket:
Upon contact with lava grants the Lava's Embrace effect for 10 seconds
'Seems to be made out of a familiar material'
ItemTooltip.BloodAltar:
Used to summon the Viscount
Consumes 5 Profane Fragments
ItemTooltip.SpringSteps: Allows you to a triple hop super jump
ItemTooltip.MixTape: Symphonic critical strikes cause an eruption of molten music notes

'It pulses with energy'
2% increased critical strike chance
ItemTooltip.ThoriumMail:
'It pulses with energy'
2% increased critical strike chance
ItemTooltip.ThoriumGreaves:
'It pulses with energy'
2% increased critical strike chance
ItemTooltip.LifeGem: Increases maximum life by 20 and life regeneration
ItemTooltip.LifeQuartzClaymore: Heals yourself upon hitting an enemy
ItemTooltip.TechniqueBlankScroll: Used in the crafting of unique technique abilities
ItemTooltip.EnchantedCane: Summons a shield that stuns nearby enemies
ItemTooltip.EnchantedStaff: Releases an enchanted beam that restores mana when defeating an enemy
ItemTooltip.LifeShieldLabel: You constantly generate a {0} life shield
ItemTooltip.PrehistoricAmberStaff:
Summons some angry dinosaurs to attack your foes
'Life finds a way'
ItemTooltip.MagickStaff: Creates a bolt of fluctuating elements
ItemTooltip.DeepStaff:
Uses 5 health points
Releases a bolt of dark magic at the cost of life
Hit enemies are briefly burned by shadow energy
ItemTooltip.LuckyRabbitsFoot:
'Made with real fake fur!'
While equipped, your luck is slightly increased
While equipped, killed enemies have a chance to drop 100% more coins
ItemTooltip.ManaBauble:
'An orb of coalesced magical energy'
Maximum mana increased by 10
ItemTooltip.SalamanderEye: While in combat for 5 seconds, your life recovery increases by 1
ItemTooltip.GiantShellSpine: While in combat, your defense increases by 1 over time up to 4
ItemTooltip.CrawdadClaw: While in combat, your armor penetration increases by 1 over time up to 2
ItemTooltip.GrandFlareGun:
Requires Storm Flares to function
Summons The Grand Thunder Bird, but only during the day in the desertz
'Aim to the skies!
ItemTooltip.SoulStone:
10% increased summon damage
Decreases your maximum life by 20
'The stone slowly feeds off your soul'
ItemTooltip.BrambleShot: Turns wooden arrows into poison arrows
ItemTooltip.Crietz: Once every second, your next critical strike causes a burst of damaging energy
ItemTooltip.Robe:
Increases maximum mana by 40
8% reduced mana cost
ItemTooltip.MoltenScale: Nearby enemies will be set on fire
ItemTooltip.BandofReplenishment:

ItemTooltip.MagmaCharmItem: Transforms you into a Molten Maggot
ItemTooltip.ShadowflameStaff: Shoots a slow moving orb of shadowflame magic
ItemTooltip.ShadowWand: Spews forth an erratic release of shadow energy
ItemTooltip.SpiritsGrace:
Your respawns happen 33% faster and give 15% more health
Your respawns also grant increased invulnerability time and movement speed

ItemTooltip.SandstoneIngot: Refined from the sands of the desert

ArmorSetBonus.LivingWood: Your Living Wood Sapling's auto attack will home in on enemies
ArmorSetBonus.Icy: An icy aura surrounds you, scorching enemies with freezing flames
ArmorSetBonus.Silk: 25% increased magic damage while above 90% maximum mana
ArmorSetBonus.YewWood: Every 6th strikes, your next ranged attack will mini-crit for 150% damage
ArmorSetBonus.Sandstone: Desert winds have granted you a sandy double jump
ArmorSetBonus.Coral:
Increases radiant damage by 1
Radiant damage accumulates up to 20 life shield
ArmorSetBonus.Blooming: Your healing spells increase life recovery
ArmorSetBonus.Ebon: Corrupts your radiant powers, causing them to take on dark forms and deal additional effects
ArmorSetBonus.NoviceCleric: Every second, a cross is generated. When hitting an enemy with radiant damage, the crosses will follow the enemy
ArmorSetBonus.Criers: Your symphonic empowerments will last an additional 3 seconds

BuffDescription.LivingWoodAcornBuff: This little guy is giving his all to protect the world
BuffDescription.MagmaCharmBuff: Your body has shrunk to a Molten Maggot
BuffDescription.LavaHugBuff: Increases life and mana regeneration every 2 seconds
BuffDescription.EnchantedCaneBuff: You are protected by a magical barrier
BuffDescription.CharmedBuff: Decreases contact damage by 25% and movement speed by 10%
BuffDescription.SpiritsGraceBuff: Increased invulnerability time and movement speed
BuffDescription.OvergrowthBuff: Your life recovery and life recovery rate have been increased
BuffDescription.SheathBuff: Your equipped sheath is ready to strike

Bestiary.ArmyAnt: An aggressive ant that patrols the depths of the jungle in search of prey
Bestiary.Blacksmith: A seasoned craftsman who shapes metal into weapons and tools. His work is as reliable as his temper is steady
Bestiary.ConfusedZombie: The Confused Zombie is a chemist turned zombie. While he's managed to keep most of his right mind, he's still a little weird
Bestiary.DesertAcolyte: The Desert Acolyte is quite nervous, but will sell all manner of equipment to those interested in throwing stuff at monsters
Bestiary.Cobbler: The Cobbler has long since retired from his heroing days, but he provides quality footwear to the next generation
Bestiary.FireAnt: It emerged straight from hell, like a burning ant seeking warmth
Bestiary.StrangeBulb: A bizarre species of plant that hasn't reached its maturity yet. Maybe that's for the best
Bestiary.MahoganyEnt: A sentient mass of mahogany that seeks to protect the jungle's flora through deadly means
Bestiary.EarthenGolem: A hulking construct of compacted stone and soil, animated by ancient forces. It remains dormant until disturbed, then retaliates with crushing force
Bestiary.EarthenBat: A crude, stone-formed bat that lurks in cavern ceilings. It dives at intruders with surprising speed despite its rigid body
Bestiary.GildedBat: A big golden bat. Its metallic sheen reflects light to disorient prey before striking
Bestiary.GildedLycan: A fearsome predator clad in natural golden plating. It stalks its prey patiently before unleashing swift and brutal attacks
Bestiary.GildedSlime: A viscous organism infused with golden particles. It absorbs impacts with ease and slowly engulfs anything careless enough to get close
Bestiary.GildedSlimeling: A smaller offshoot of the Gilded Slime. Less durable, but far more numerous and annoyingly persistent
Bestiary.TheGrandThunderBird: Blessed with the dominion over storms, this majestic bird soars through the desert skies. It seemed to be testing you...
Bestiary.StormHatchling: An electrically charged apparition of an adolescent Thunder Bird
Bestiary.TheInnocent: This innocent creature once peacefully roamed the forests of Terraria before the Corruption's dark spread reached it
Bestiary.LivingHemorrage: A gruesome teratoma formed from the flesh of the Crimson itself. Doesn't like to go down easily
Bestiary.CoinBagGold: You'd think gold would just weigh down this greedy sack of coins, but it just boosts its resolve to run from Terrarians
Bestiary.CoinBagSilver: Having been around the caverns, this bag of coins leaves the scene as soon as a greedy Terrarian makes their appearance
Bestiary.CoinBagCopper: This enchanted pile of coins only just recently gained sentience, but it will try its hardest to keep its riches for itself
Bestiary.FlamekinCaster: A bizarre creature harnesses the power of lava pools found deep in the caverns to summon explosive fire bats
Bestiary.Biter: The zombification process can result in some unique outcomes. This variant just bleeds a lot

NPCChat.Blacksmith_2: A good blade makes all the difference.
NPCChat.Blacksmith_3: I can hear the metal calling already.
NPCChat.Blacksmith_4: Bring me materials, and I’ll make them worth your time.
NPCChat.DesertAcolyte_1: We certainly have some strange people around this town, don't we...?
NPCChat.DesertAcolyte_2: You didn't see any giant bird shadows while you were out in the desert, did you?
NPCChat.DesertAcolyte_3: I had originally stopped just to refill my canteen, but you seem like someone who can deal with a real threat!
NPCChat.DesertAcolyte_4: Have you ever heard tale of the Thunder Birds? Legend says they had long protected our world from cataclysmic threats, before a disagreement between them and three individuals led to their disappearance...
NPCChat.ConfusedZombie_1: I can't remember much about my past life... Chemicals and the like were my passion I think; I only get fragments and pieces of the truth. It's saddening at times...
NPCChat.ConfusedZombie_2: Most people don't have the stomach to handle the things I sell. The trick is to not have a stomach at all!
NPCChat.ConfusedZombie_3: I gotta thank you for letting me stick around. Only coming out at night is pretty boring...
NPCChat.ConfusedZombie_4: Why am I not like the others...? Oh, I'm sorry, did you need something?
NPCChat.Cobbler_1: In my younger years, I myself was a hero. But after a bad fall, I've since retired. Perhaps if I had better boots back then I would still be a hero today...
NPCChat.Cobbler_2: Worry not young {0}. While the journey may be tough, I have full confidence in your ability!
NPCChat.Cobbler_3: Having proper footwear is no joke, {0}. Always make sure your shoes are polished and ready for adventure!
NPCChat.Cobbler_4: You can learn a lot by walking a mile in someone else's boots. If only some of these townsfolk would walk a mile in yours, then they could understand...
NPCChat.Cobbler_5: How are you doing, {0}? Are you staying safe out there in the wilds?

Blacksmith.Content: Strange... the forge hasn't sung a single note today.
Blacksmith.DislikeBiome: Something about {0} throws off my rhythm.
Blacksmith.DislikeCrowded: Too many bodies, too much noise... ruins the craft.
Blacksmith.DislikeNPC: I'd rather keep my distance from {0}.
Blacksmith.HateBiome: {0} suffocates the flame. I won't work like this.
Blacksmith.HateCrowded: This chaos? No forge can breathe in a place like this.
Blacksmith.HateNPC: {0} grinds my patience thinner than steel.
Blacksmith.LikeBiome: {0}... not bad. The forge holds steady here.
Blacksmith.LikeNPC: {0} knows the value of true craftsmanship.
Blacksmith.LoveBiome: Now this—{0}—this is where a forge belongs.
Blacksmith.LoveSpace: Good space, steady air... the forge can finally breathe.
Blacksmith.NoHome: A forge needs a proper home. This won’t do.
Blacksmith.FarFromHome: Being this far from my tools feels... wrong.
Blacksmith.SpecialMoodText: I don’t hammer steel under moonlight. Nothing good comes from it.

DesertAcolyte.Content: The desert speaks in silence... you just have to listen.
DesertAcolyte.DislikeBiome: {0} feels... unnatural. The sands reject it.
DesertAcolyte.DislikeCrowded: Too many voices drown out the whispers of the wind.
DesertAcolyte.DislikeNPC: {0} disturbs the balance I try to keep.
DesertAcolyte.HateBiome: {0} suffocates the spirit of the desert. I cannot remain here.
DesertAcolyte.HateCrowded: This noise... I cannot hear the sands at all.
DesertAcolyte.HateNPC: {0} brings nothing but disruption. I want no part of it.
DesertAcolyte.LikeBiome: {0}... it has some harmony, at least.
DesertAcolyte.LikeNPC: {0} walks a path not so different from mine.
DesertAcolyte.LoveBiome: Yes... {0} resonates with the desert's true voice.
DesertAcolyte.LoveNPC: {0} understands more than they let on.
DesertAcolyte.LoveSpace: The open air... the wind carries clarity here.
DesertAcolyte.NoHome: I need a place where the winds may pass freely.
DesertAcolyte.FarFromHome: Too far... I can no longer feel the desert's presence.
DesertAcolyte.SpecialMoodText: The winds are restless tonight... something stirs beneath the sands.

ConfusedZombie.DislikeBiome: {0} just... doesn't feel right. My joints ache here.
ConfusedZombie.DislikeCrowded: My neighbors are becoming quite rude to me simply because of what I am, this is so sad...
ConfusedZombie.DislikeNPC: {0} keeps giving me really weird looks.
ConfusedZombie.HateBiome: Do I like it here... Do I fear for my life... Do I lik- Nope. Nope. Out.
ConfusedZombie.HateCrowded: So many people here! A full buffet... O-oh, you didn't hear that, did you?
ConfusedZombie.HateNPC: I bet {0} has a big juicy brain... Not that I would wanna... uh... Did you need something?
ConfusedZombie.LikeBiome: {0}... at least it's bearable around here.
ConfusedZombie.LikeNPC: {0} always helps open doors for me, they're so considerate!
ConfusedZombie.LoveBiome: The forest just... makes me happy, like I belong here.
ConfusedZombie.LoveNPC: I feel an odd, but good connection with {0}. Dunno why, I just feel it.
ConfusedZombie.LoveSpace: Love me some empty space, it lets me not worry about others when I'm making my repellents.
ConfusedZombie.NoHome: Ah, I seemed to have forgotten where my home was. Could you help me out with that?
ConfusedZombie.FarFromHome: Walk ten paces, check around, if I ain't home, then... how did that one go...
ConfusedZombie.SpecialMoodText: Why am I not like the others? Oh, I'm sorry, did you need something?

Cobbler.Content: I've got a pep in my step, don't you worry!
Cobbler.DislikeBiome: I'm too old to be walking around {0}.
Cobbler.DislikeCrowded: Quite a few too many people around here, don't you think?
Cobbler.DislikeNPC: {0} could learn a thing or two about proper footwear.
Cobbler.HateBiome: If I were younger I could handle {0}, but now I'm too old!
Cobbler.HateCrowded: I can't keep up with all these shoe orders. It's far too crowded over here.
Cobbler.HateNPC: {0} is just asking for an accident with those shoes.
Cobbler.LikeBiome: {0} isn't a bad place for a walk.
Cobbler.LikeNPC: {0} understands the importance of good footwear.
Cobbler.LoveBiome: The forest really is the best place to walk around in.
Cobbler.LoveSpace: It's easiest to focus on my work when I have some space to myself, so I'm quite chipper!
Cobbler.NoHome: It's hard to work when I don't have a workstation. Think you could help me out?
Cobbler.FarFromHome: I'll need to touch up my shoes again when I get back home...
Cobbler.SpecialMoodText: My knees aren't what they used to be, but I can still tell when a good pair of boots has seen adventure.

DeathMessage.DeepStaff: {0} drained their own soul for power, leading to their death
